title: gnaphalium ruahinicum
intro: Gnaphalium ruahinicum, also known as the New Zealand cudweed, is a type of flowering plant in the daisy family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in reducing inflammation and soothing skin irritations. The health benefits of Gnaphalium ruahinicum include its ability to aid in wound healing, lower blood pressure, and provide relief from menstrual cramps and digestive issues. Gnaphalium ruahinicum can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including infusions, salves, and tinctures, which can be used topically or taken internally.
